## What this changes

Brief summary of the change.

## Why

Problem being solved. Link issues with `Fixes #123` or `Closes #123` if applicable.

## How tested

- [ ] `pytest -m 'not slow'` passes locally (server)
- [ ] `yarn vitest run` passes locally (client, if frontend touched)
- [ ] `docker compose up` smoke-tested end-to-end
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior (or existing tests updated)
- [ ] Manual UI check (if frontend changes)

## Licensing

Pick one:

- [ ] **Runtime contribution** (anything outside the Apache 2.0 carve-outs documented in [docs/NODE_TYPE_API.md](../blob/main/docs/NODE_TYPE_API.md)) — I have signed the [CLA](../blob/main/CLA.md) (CLA Assistant bot will check on first PR).
- [ ] **Plugin SDK / demo / docs contribution** (Apache 2.0) — my commits include a `Signed-off-by: Name <email@…>` DCO line (`git commit -s`).

## Screenshots / logs (if relevant)

For UI changes, before/after screenshots. For bug fixes, the failing log + the passing log.

## Anything reviewers should know
